title: Some Reactions with 3-Cyano and 3-Acetyl 4-Aryl-5, 6-Dihydro-Naphtha(2, 1-E)2(1H)Pyridinones
author: I. I. ABDEL-GAWAD
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemistry Department, Faculty of Science, Mansoura University, Mansoura, A. R. E. (EGYPT) 

  Manuscript received 27 December 1976, accepted 25 February 1977.  

 Various 3-acyl-4-aryl-5, 6-dihydro-naphtha (2, 1-e) 2 (1H) pyridinones  have  been synthesized by the reaction of corresponding 3-cyano derivatives with Grignard reagent. Condensation of 3-acetyl derivatives with aromatic aldehydes yields the chalcone anaolgues. Condensation of the chalcone analogues with hydrazines has been described.

Condensation of 3-acetyl derivatives with aromatic aldehydes yields the chalcone anaolgues. Condensation of the chalcone analogues with hydrazines has been described.
